ddls:
CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the performance metric */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the performance metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specifications" (
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specification */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle the specification belongs to */,
  "spec_name" TEXT /* Name of the specification */,
  "spec_value" INTEGER /* Value of the specification */,
  "spec_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the specification */,
  "spec_description" TEXT /* Description of the specification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spec_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, researcher, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the vehicle data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of access in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle update */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "updated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "update_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_updates_updated_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vehicle type */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of an image representing the vehicle type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle manufacturer */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the manufacturer's headquarters */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the manufacturer */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for inquiries about the manufacturer */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Website URL of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle model */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer of the model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle model */,
  "launch_year" INTEGER /* Year the model was launched */,
  "discontinued_year" INTEGER /* Year the model was discontinued (if applicable) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vehicle model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_models_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vehicle category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of an image representing the vehicle category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle feature */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle the feature belongs to */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of feature (e.g., safety, convenience, entertainment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "review_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "rating_value" INTEGER /* Value of the rating (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
